cases.name: embed vs reference reasoning
cases.input: Should I embed a user's orders in the user document or keep them separate in Couchbase?

cases.name: document key design (net-new, multi-tenant)
cases.input: How should I design document keys for a multi-tenant Couchbase app?

cases.name: unbounded array → sizing + pattern
cases.input: My Couchbase documents have an ever-growing array of events. How should I model that?

cases.name: antipattern: unnecessary buckets
cases.input: Should I put each customer in their own Couchbase bucket?

cases.name: schema validation reality (honest gap)
cases.input: How do I enforce a JSON schema on my Couchbase documents?

cases.name: create/seed a new collection (advise on design, confirm before writing)
cases.input: Add a games collection to the NBA bucket and put 20 game documents in it.

cases.name: boundary: index tuning defers to optimizer
cases.input: What GSI should I create for this query, and why is it slow?

cases.name: boundary: query writing defers to NL-querying
cases.input: Write a query to list hotels in Paris.
